sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports difficulty with their right foot, weakness in their right leg, and a sweet tooth. He also reports weight gain. The patient reports weight gain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Vital signs are normal. The patient's hemoglobin a1c is 8. The patient's hemoglobin a1c was 8. A 2 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur is auscultated. The lumbar spine x-ray is normal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has an acute lumbar strain. The patient has diabetes.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe meloxicam 15 mg once daily. Order an MRI. Increase metformin to 1000 mg twice daily. Order a hemoglobin a1c in 2 months. Continue lisinopril 20 mg once daily and lasix. Schedule a physical therapy referral.
